QK-03.question: Who are your main competitors and what is your competitive advantage?

QK-04.question: How will the business operate day-to-day?

QK-05.question: What are the key operational milestones for Year 1?

QK-06.question: What equipment, inventory, or technology does the business require?

QK-07.question: What are your startup costs broken down by category?

QK-08.question: What is your projected monthly revenue for months 1-6?

QK-09.question: What are your projected monthly operating expenses?

QK-10.question: When do you project the business will reach break-even?

QK-11.question: What is the size of your target market?

QK-12.question: What market trends support your business?

QK-14.question: Are there plans to expand beyond the initial location?
